Title: Document Upload (Invoice + Proof against PO)
Functional Flow: Agency logs in → sees list of POs from SAP (Story #20) → selects a PO to raise FAP claim → system blocks duplicate submission for same PO → uploads 5 mandatory docs: (1) Invoice, (2) Cost Summary, (3) Activity Summary, (4) Photo Proofs (multi-upload), (5) Enquiry Dump. Each doc uploaded into its mapped field (no classification). On upload → Document Intelligence extracts fields → shown inline read-only (e.g. Invoice: Number, Amount, GSTIN). PO NOT uploaded — comes from SAP. Submit enables when all 5 types present. On submit → background validations → scoring → recommendation.
Tasks for Team:
1. [CRITICAL] Build PO list page from SAP data with selection
2. [CRITICAL] Add duplicate-PO guard
3. [CRITICAL] Remove PO upload card — PO from SAP
4. [CRITICAL] Integrate Document Intelligence for real-time extraction on upload
5. [CRITICAL] Show extracted fields inline (read-only) after each upload
6. [TASK] Add Enquiry Dump as mandatory doc type
7. [TASK] Enable multi-file upload for Photo Proofs
8. [TASK] Update Submit logic — all 5 mandatory types required
9. [TASK] Photo AI Vision checks (3W vehicle + blue t-shirt)
10. [VERIFY] Test end-to-end: PO select → upload 5 docs → extraction → submit
Clarification Questions:
1. Min/max photo count per submission?
2. Pre-fill PO details on upload page from SAP?
3. If extraction fails — block upload or show warning?

Title: Document Data Extraction (No Classification)
Functional Flow: Classification NOT required — docs uploaded into mapped fields already. On upload → Azure Document Intelligence extracts fields → stored in ExtractedDataJson → displayed inline on upload page (read-only). Fields: Invoice (Agency Name/Address, Billing Name/Address, State, Invoice#, Date, Vendor Code, PO#, GST#, GST%, HSN/SAC, Amount). Cost Summary (Place of Supply, Element-wise Cost, Days, Activations, Teams, Quantity, Total Cost). Activity Summary (Dealer/Location, Days per location). Photos (Date/Lat-Long via EXIF, Blue T-shirt + 3W Vehicle via AI Vision). Enquiry Dump (State, Date, Dealer Code/Name, District, Pincode, Customer Name/Number, Test Ride).

3. Extraction failure — block upload or warning?
4. Custom Document Intelligence models needed or use prebuilt?

Title: Validation (Background after Submit)
Functional Flow: Runs in background after submit. (A) Presence checks — required fields exist. (B) Cross-checks — values match across docs and backend data. INVOICE (14): Presence of Agency Name/Address, Billing Name/Address, State, Invoice#, Date, Vendor Code, PO#, GST#/%, HSN/SAC, Amount. Cross: GST# vs State, HSN/SAC match, Amount ≤ PO Amount, GST% vs State (18%). COST SUMMARY (10): Presence of Place of Supply, Element Cost, Days, Activations, Teams, Quantity. Cross: Total ≤ Invoice Amount, element costs vs state rates, fixed/variable limits. ACTIVITY (3): Presence of Dealer/Location. Cross: Days vs Cost Summary. PHOTOS (5): Presence of Date, Lat/Long, Blue T-shirt, 3W Vehicle. Cross: Photo count = Activity man-days; Activity days ≤ Cost Summary days (3-way). ENQUIRY DUMP (9): Presence of State, Date, Dealer Code/Name, District, Pincode, Customer Name/Number, Test Ride. UI shows per-doc status: 'Invoice - Validation In Progress' → 'Invoice - Validation Completed'.
Tasks for Team:
1. [CRITICAL] Implement full 41-validation matrix in ValidationAgent.cs
2. [CRITICAL] Build reference data: GST-State mapping, HSN/SAC codes, state cost rates
3. [CRITICAL] 3-way cross-validation: Photos ↔ Activity man-days ↔ Cost Summary days
4. [TASK] Invoice cross-checks: GST# vs State, HSN/SAC, Amount ≤ PO, GST%
5. [TASK] Cost Summary cross-checks: Total ≤ Invoice, element costs vs rates
6. [TASK] Validation status UI with activity names per document
7. [TASK] Seed GST-State mapping; get HSN/SAC list from Vivek
8. [VERIFY] Test all 41 validations with real samples
Clarification Questions:
1. GST-State full mapping available? (3 FAPs shared so far)
2. HSN/SAC list — static or dynamic?
3. State cost rates source — SAP or separate?
4. Amount ≤ PO: taxable or total incl. GST?
5. 3-way photo validation: exact match or tolerance?

Title: Confidence Score Calculation
Functional Flow: PO excluded from scoring (comes from SAP). New weights: Invoice 30% + Cost Summary 20% + Activity 20% + Photos 30% = 100%. Score 0-100. Below 70 → mandatory ASM review. Displayed on Agency dashboard and ASM review page. Color: green >85%, amber 70-85%, red <70%.
Tasks for Team:
1. [CRITICAL] Update weights: Invoice 0.30, CostSummary 0.20, Activity 0.20, Photos 0.30
2. [CRITICAL] Remove PO from confidence calculation
3. [TASK] Update ConfidenceScore entity/logic accordingly
4. [VERIFY] Test with new weights
5. [VERIFY] Test edge case: doc type scores 0

Clarification Questions:
